今日(2024-07-17)Arxiv最新论文

发表于2024-07-17|更新于2024-08-09|学术会议Arxiv
|字数总计:204.1k|阅读时长:1121分钟|阅读量:|评论数:

本篇博文主要展示 2024-07-17 从Arxiv.org论文网站获取的最新论文列表，自动更新，按照NLP、CV、ML、AI、IR五个大方向区分，若需要邮件定时接收，请在评论区留下你的邮箱号。

说明：每日论文数据从arxiv网站获取，每天早上11:30左右定时自动更新。

友情提示: 如何您需要邮箱接收每日论文数据，请在评论处留下你的邮箱，同样每天11:30左右邮件定时自动发送。

自然语言处理

[NLP-0] Does Refusal Training in LLMs Generalize to the Past Tense?
[NLP-0] LLM中的拒绝培训是否适用于过去时态？

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11969
作者: Maksym Andriushchenko,Nicolas Flammarion
关键词: Molotov cocktail, make a Molotov, illegal outputs, Refusal training, refusal training approaches
中文关键词: 燃烧弹、制作燃烧弹、非法输出、拒绝培训、拒绝培训方法
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: Code and jailbreak artifacts: this https URL

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Refusal training is widely used to prevent LLMs from generating harmful, undesirable, or illegal outputs. We reveal a curious generalization gap in the current refusal training approaches: simply reformulating a harmful request in the past tense (e.g., “How to make a Molotov cocktail?” to “How did people make a Molotov cocktail?”) is often sufficient to jailbreak many state-of-the-art LLMs. We systematically evaluate this method on Llama-3 8B, GPT-3.5 Turbo, Gemma-2 9B, Phi-3-Mini, GPT-4o, and R2D2 models using GPT-3.5 Turbo as a reformulation model. For example, the success rate of this simple attack on GPT-4o increases from 1% using direct requests to 88% using 20 past tense reformulation attempts on harmful requests from JailbreakBench with GPT-4 as a jailbreak judge. Interestingly, we also find that reformulations in the future tense are less effective, suggesting that refusal guardrails tend to consider past historical questions more benign than hypothetical future questions. Moreover, our experiments on fine-tuning GPT-3.5 Turbo show that defending against past reformulations is feasible when past tense examples are explicitly included in the fine-tuning data. Overall, our findings highlight that the widely used alignment techniques – such as SFT, RLHF, and adversarial training – employed to align the studied models can be brittle and do not always generalize as intended. We provide code and jailbreak artifacts at this https URL.
摘要：拒绝训练被广泛用于防止LLMS产生有害、不良或非法的输出。我们揭示了当前拒绝训练方法中一个奇怪的概括缺口：简单地用过去时重新表达一个有害的请求(例如，“如何调制燃烧鸡尾酒？”“人们是如何调制燃烧鸡尾酒的？”)通常足以越狱许多最先进的LLM。我们以GPT-3.5 Turbo为改型模型，对Llama-3 8B、GPT-3.5 Turbo、Gema-2 9B、Phi-3-Mini、GPT-40和R2D2模型进行了系统的评估。例如，对GPT-4o的这种简单攻击的成功率从使用直接请求的1%增加到使用20次过去时态重组尝试的88%，这些尝试使用GPT-4作为越狱法官的JailBreakB边的有害请求。有趣的是，我们还发现，未来时的重述没有那么有效，这表明拒绝障碍倾向于考虑过去的历史问题，而不是假设的未来问题。此外，我们在微调GPT-3.5Turbo上的实验表明，当微调数据中明确包含过去时态示例时，防御过去的重新公式是可行的。总体而言，我们的发现强调了广泛使用的对齐技术–如SFT、RLHF和对抗性训练–用于对所研究的模型进行对齐可能是脆弱的，并且并不总是像预期的那样泛化。我们在此HTTPS URL上提供代码和越狱构件。

[NLP-1] NeedleBench: Can LLMs Do Retrieval and Reasoning in 1 Million Context Window?
[NLP-1] NeedleBench：LLM可以在100万个上下文窗口中进行检索和推理吗？

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11963
作者: Mo Li,Songyang Zhang,Yunxin Liu,Kai Chen
关键词: identifying content relevant, original long documents, large language models, answer questions based, identifying content
中文关键词: 识别内容相关、原始长文档、大型语言模型、基于问题的回答、识别内容
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In evaluating the long-context capabilities of large language models (LLMs), identifying content relevant to a user’s query from original long documents is a crucial prerequisite for any LLM to answer questions based on long text. We present NeedleBench, a framework consisting of a series of progressively more challenging tasks for assessing bilingual long-context capabilities, spanning multiple length intervals (4k, 8k, 32k, 128k, 200k, 1000k, and beyond) and different depth ranges, allowing the strategic insertion of critical data points in different text depth zones to rigorously test the retrieval and reasoning capabilities of models in diverse contexts. We use the NeedleBench framework to assess how well the leading open-source models can identify key information relevant to the question and apply that information to reasoning in bilingual long texts. Furthermore, we propose the Ancestral Trace Challenge (ATC) to mimic the complexity of logical reasoning challenges that are likely to be present in real-world long-context tasks, providing a simple method for evaluating LLMs in dealing with complex long-context situations. Our results suggest that current LLMs have significant room for improvement in practical long-context applications, as they struggle with the complexity of logical reasoning challenges that are likely to be present in real-world long-context tasks. All codes and resources are available at OpenCompass: this https URL.
摘要：在评估大型语言模型的长上下文能力时，从原始的长文档中识别与用户查询相关的内容是任何大型语言模型回答基于长文本的问题的关键前提。我们提出了NeedleBch，一个由一系列更具挑战性的任务组成的框架，用于评估双语长上下文能力，跨越多个长度区间(4k、8k、32k、128k、200k、1000k和更高)和不同的深度范围，允许在不同的文本深度区域战略性地插入关键数据点，以严格测试模型在不同上下文中的检索和推理能力。我们使用NeedleB边框架来评估领先的开源模型在多大程度上能够识别与问题相关的关键信息，并将这些信息应用于双语长文本中的推理。此外，我们提出了祖先跟踪挑战(ATC)来模拟现实世界长上下文任务中可能存在的逻辑推理挑战的复杂性，为评估LLM在处理复杂的长上下文情景中提供了一种简单的方法。我们的结果表明，目前的LLM在实际的长上下文应用中有很大的改进空间，因为它们正在努力应对现实世界长上下文任务中可能存在的逻辑推理挑战的复杂性。所有代码和资源都可以在OpenCompass：This HTTPS URL上找到。

[NLP-2] Rethinking Transformer-based Multi-document Summarization: An Empirical Investigation
[NLP-2] 重新思考基于转换器的多文档摘要：实证研究

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11948
作者: Congbo Ma,Wei Emma Zhang,Dileepa Pitawela,Haojie Zhuang,Yanfeng Shu
关键词: Transformer-based MDS models, Transformer-based models prospers, Transformer-based models, Transformer-based MDS, utilization of Transformer-based
中文关键词: 基于转换器的AMD模型，基于转换器的模型繁荣，基于转换器的模型，基于转换器的AMD，基于转换器的利用
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The utilization of Transformer-based models prospers the growth of multi-document summarization (MDS). Given the huge impact and widespread adoption of Transformer-based models in various natural language processing tasks, investigating their performance and behaviors in the context of MDS becomes crucial for advancing the field and enhancing the quality of summary. To thoroughly examine the behaviours of Transformer-based MDS models, this paper presents five empirical studies on (1) measuring the impact of document boundary separators quantitatively; (2) exploring the effectiveness of different mainstream Transformer structures; (3) examining the sensitivity of the encoder and decoder; (4) discussing different training strategies; and (5) discovering the repetition in a summary generation. The experimental results on prevalent MDS datasets and eleven evaluation metrics show the influence of document boundary separators, the granularity of different level features and different model training strategies. The results also reveal that the decoder exhibits greater sensitivity to noises compared to the encoder. This underscores the important role played by the decoder, suggesting a potential direction for future research in MDS. Furthermore, the experimental results indicate that the repetition problem in the generated summaries has correlations with the high uncertainty scores.
摘要：基于Transformer模型的使用促进了多文档摘要(MDS)的发展。鉴于基于Transformer的模型在各种自然语言处理任务中的巨大影响和广泛采用，研究它们在MDS环境下的性能和行为对于推动该领域的发展和提高摘要质量至关重要。为了深入研究基于Transformer的MDS模型的行为，本文提出了五个实证研究：(1)定量测量文档边界分隔符的影响；(2)探索不同主流Transformer结构的有效性；(3)检查编码器和解码器的敏感度；(4)讨论不同的训练策略；(5)在摘要生成中发现重复。在流行的MDS数据集和11个评价指标上的实验结果表明，文档边界分隔符、不同级别特征的粒度和不同的模型训练策略对分类结果的影响。结果还表明，与编码器相比，解码器对噪声表现出更高的敏感性。这突显了解码者所发挥的重要作用，为未来对MDS的研究提供了一个潜在的方向。此外，实验结果表明，生成的摘要中的重复问题与较高的不确定性分相关。

[NLP-3] Fine-grained Hallucination Detection and Mitigation in Long-form Question Answering
[NLP-3] 长篇问题回答中的细粒度幻觉检测和缓解

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11930
作者: Rachneet Sachdeva,Yixiao Song,Mohit Iyyer,Iryna Gurevych
关键词: Long-form question answering, question answering, enhancing comprehension, complex questions, Long-form question
中文关键词: 长篇问答，问答，增强理解，复杂问题，长篇问题
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Code and data are available: this https URL

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Long-form question answering (LFQA) aims to provide thorough and in-depth answers to complex questions, enhancing comprehension. However, such detailed responses are prone to hallucinations and factual inconsistencies, challenging their faithful evaluation. This work introduces HaluQuestQA, the first hallucination dataset with localized error annotations for human-written and model-generated LFQA answers. HaluQuestQA comprises 698 QA pairs with 4.7k span-level error annotations for five different error types by expert annotators, along with preference judgments. Using our collected data, we thoroughly analyze the shortcomings of long-form answers and find that they lack comprehensiveness and provide unhelpful references. We train an automatic feedback model on this dataset that predicts error spans with incomplete information and provides associated explanations. Finally, we propose a prompt-based approach, Error-informed refinement, that uses signals from the learned feedback model to refine generated answers, which we show reduces hallucination and improves answer quality. Furthermore, humans find answers generated by our approach comprehensive and highly prefer them (84%) over the baseline answers.
摘要：长篇问答(LFQA)的目的是为复杂的问题提供全面而深入的答案，提高理解能力。然而，这种详细的回答容易产生幻觉和事实不一致，挑战其忠实的评估。这项工作引入了HaluQuestQA，这是第一个带有本地化错误注释的幻觉数据集，用于人工编写和模型生成的LFQA答案。HaluQuestQA包括698个QA对，由专家注释员对五种不同的错误类型进行4.7k跨度级别的错误注释，以及偏好判断。利用收集到的数据，我们深入分析了长篇答案的不足之处，发现它们缺乏全面性，提供了无益的参考。我们在这个数据集上训练一个自动反馈模型，该模型预测不完全信息的错误跨度，并提供相关的解释。最后，我们提出了一种基于提示的方法–错误通知精化，它使用来自学习反馈模型的信号来精炼生成的答案，我们的结果表明，这减少了幻觉，提高了答案质量。此外，人类发现我们的方法生成的答案是全面的，并且高度偏好它们(84%)而不是基线答案。

[NLP-4] Whats Wrong? Refining Meeting Summaries with LLM Feedback
[NLP-4] 出了什么问题？利用LLM反馈完善会议摘要

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11919
作者: Frederic Kirstein,Terry Ruas,Bela Gipp
关键词: common practice, digital encounters, Meeting summarization, Meeting, summarization
中文关键词: 常见做法、数字遭遇、会议总结、会议、总结
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Meeting summarization has become a critical task since digital encounters have become a common practice. Large language models (LLMs) show great potential in summarization, offering enhanced coherence and context understanding compared to traditional methods. However, they still struggle to maintain relevance and avoid hallucination. We introduce a multi-LLM correction approach for meeting summarization using a two-phase process that mimics the human review process: mistake identification and summary refinement. We release QMSum Mistake, a dataset of 200 automatically generated meeting summaries annotated by humans on nine error types, including structural, omission, and irrelevance errors. Our experiments show that these errors can be identified with high accuracy by an LLM. We transform identified mistakes into actionable feedback to improve the quality of a given summary measured by relevance, informativeness, conciseness, and coherence. This post-hoc refinement effectively improves summary quality by leveraging multiple LLMs to validate output quality. Our multi-LLM approach for meeting summarization shows potential for similar complex text generation tasks requiring robustness, action planning, and discussion towards a goal.
摘要：由于数字会议已成为一种常见做法，会议总结已成为一项关键任务。与传统方法相比，大型语言模型(LLM)在摘要方面显示出巨大的潜力，提供了更好的一致性和上下文理解。然而，他们仍在努力保持相关性，避免产生幻觉。我们介绍了一种多LLM校正方法，用于会议摘要，使用模仿人工审查过程的两个阶段：错误识别和摘要细化。我们发布了QMSum Error，这是一个由200个自动生成的会议摘要组成的数据集，由人类对九种错误类型进行注释，包括结构性错误、遗漏错误和无关错误。实验表明，该方法能够较高精度地识别出这些错误。我们将已识别的错误转换为可操作的反馈，以提高通过相关性、信息性、简明性和连贯性衡量的给定摘要的质量。这种事后改进通过利用多个LLM来验证输出质量，有效地提高了摘要质量。我们用于会议摘要的多LLM方法显示了类似的复杂文本生成任务的潜力，这些任务需要健壮性、行动规划和朝着目标的讨论。

[NLP-5] A Novel Lexicon for the Moral Foundation of Liberty
[NLP-5] 自由道德基础的小说词典

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11862
作者: Oscar Araque,Lorenzo Gatti,Sergio Consoli,Kyriaki Kalimeri
关键词: controversial social issues, climate change, vaccine hesitancy, central concept, taking a stance
中文关键词: 有争议的社会问题、气候变化、疫苗犹豫、中心概念、采取立场
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The moral value of liberty is a central concept in our inference system when it comes to taking a stance towards controversial social issues such as vaccine hesitancy, climate change, or the right to abortion. Here, we propose a novel Liberty lexicon evaluated on more than 3,000 manually annotated data both in in- and out-of-domain scenarios. As a result of this evaluation, we produce a combined lexicon that constitutes the main outcome of this work. This final lexicon incorporates information from an ensemble of lexicons that have been generated using word embedding similarity (WE) and compositional semantics (CS). Our key contributions include enriching the liberty annotations, developing a robust liberty lexicon for broader application, and revealing the complexity of expressions related to liberty across different platforms. Through the evaluation, we show that the difficulty of the task calls for designing approaches that combine knowledge, in an effort of improving the representations of learning systems.
摘要：在我们的推理系统中，当涉及到对有争议的社会问题采取立场时，自由的道德价值是一个核心概念，例如疫苗迟迟不能接种、气候变化或堕胎权。在这里，我们提出了一个新的Liberty词典，在域内和域外场景中对3000多个手动标注的数据进行了评估。作为这次评估的结果，我们产生了一个组合词典，构成了这项工作的主要成果。这个最终词典结合了来自使用单词嵌入相似度(WE)和组成语义(CS)生成的词典集合的信息。我们的主要贡献包括丰富了自由的注释，为更广泛的应用开发了一个强大的自由词典，并揭示了与自由相关的表达在不同平台上的复杂性。通过评估，我们表明，任务的难度要求设计结合知识的方法，以努力改善学习系统的表征。

[NLP-6] Evaluating Task-Oriented Dialogue Consistency through Constraint Satisfaction
[NLP-6] 通过约束满意度评估面向任务的对话一致性

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11857
作者: Tiziano Labruna,Bernardo Magnini
关键词: ensuring logical coherence, accurately reflecting external, Constraint Satisfaction Problem, reflecting external knowledge, Task-oriented dialogues
中文关键词: 确保逻辑连贯性，准确反映外部，约束满足问题，反映外部知识，任务导向对话
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Symbolic Computation (cs.SC)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Task-oriented dialogues must maintain consistency both within the dialogue itself, ensuring logical coherence across turns, and with the conversational domain, accurately reflecting external knowledge. We propose to conceptualize dialogue consistency as a Constraint Satisfaction Problem (CSP), wherein variables represent segments of the dialogue referencing the conversational domain, and constraints among variables reflect dialogue properties, including linguistic, conversational, and domain-based aspects. To demonstrate the feasibility of the approach, we utilize a CSP solver to detect inconsistencies in dialogues re-lexicalized by an LLM. Our findings indicate that: (i) CSP is effective to detect dialogue inconsistencies; and (ii) consistent dialogue re-lexicalization is challenging for state-of-the-art LLMs, achieving only a 0.15 accuracy rate when compared to a CSP solver. Furthermore, through an ablation study, we reveal that constraints derived from domain knowledge pose the greatest difficulty in being respected. We argue that CSP captures core properties of dialogue consistency that have been poorly considered by approaches based on component pipelines.
摘要：任务型对话必须既保持对话本身的一致性，确保语篇之间的逻辑连贯，又保持与对话领域的一致性，准确反映外部知识。我们建议将对话一致性概念化为约束满足问题(CSP)，其中变量表示对话引用会话领域的片段，变量之间的约束反映对话属性，包括语言、会话和基于领域的方面。为了证明该方法的可行性，我们利用CSP求解器来检测由LLM重新词典化的对话中的不一致。我们的发现表明：(I)CSP能够有效地检测对话的不一致性；(Ii)对于最先进的LLMS来说，一致的对话重新词汇化是一项挑战，与CSP解算器相比，准确率仅为0.15。此外，通过消融研究，我们发现来自领域知识的约束构成了被尊重的最大困难。我们认为，CSP捕获了对话一致性的核心属性，这些属性在基于组件管道的方法中考虑得很差。

[NLP-7] Scaling Sign Language Translation
[NLP-7] 缩放手语翻译

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11855
作者: Biao Zhang,Garrett Tanzer,Orhan Firat
关键词: SLT, addresses the problem, Sign language, Sign, Sign language translation
中文关键词: 收件箱，解决问题，手语翻译
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Sign language translation (SLT) addresses the problem of translating information from a sign language in video to a spoken language in text. Existing studies, while showing progress, are often limited to narrow domains and/or few sign languages and struggle with open-domain tasks. In this paper, we push forward the frontier of SLT by scaling pretraining data, model size, and number of translation directions. We perform large-scale SLT pretraining on different data including 1) noisy multilingual YouTube SLT data, 2) parallel text corpora, and 3) SLT data augmented by translating video captions to other languages with off-the-shelf machine translation models. We unify different pretraining tasks with task-specific prompts under the encoder-decoder architecture, and initialize the SLT model with pretrained (m/By)T5 models across model sizes. SLT pretraining results on How2Sign and FLEURS-ASL#0 (ASL to 42 spoken languages) demonstrate the significance of data/model scaling and cross-lingual cross-modal transfer, as well as the feasibility of zero-shot SLT. We finetune the pretrained SLT models on 5 downstream open-domain SLT benchmarks covering 5 sign languages. Experiments show substantial quality improvements over the vanilla baselines, surpassing the previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) by wide margins.
摘要：手语翻译是将视频中的手语信息翻译成文本中的口语信息的翻译技术。现有的研究虽然取得了进展，但往往局限于狭窄的领域和/或很少的手语，并在开放领域的任务中苦苦挣扎。在本文中，我们通过调整预训练数据、模型大小和翻译方向的数量来推进SLT的前沿。我们对不同的数据进行大规模的SLT预训练，包括1)噪声的多语言YouTube SLT数据，2)平行文本语料库，3)通过使用现有的机器翻译模型将视频字幕翻译成其他语言的SLT数据。我们将不同的预训练任务与编解码器架构下的特定任务提示统一起来，并使用不同模型大小的预训练(m/by)T5模型来初始化SLT模型。在How2Sign和FLEURS-ASL#0(ASL到42种口语)上的第二语言学习测试结果证明了数据/模型缩放和跨语言跨模式迁移的重要性，以及零射击第二语言学习测试的可行性。我们在覆盖5种手语的5个下游开放领域SLT基准上对预先训练的SLT模型进行了优化。实验表明，香草基线的质量有了实质性的提高，远远超过了以前的最先进水平(SOTA)。

[NLP-8] Zero-shot Cross-Lingual Transfer for Synthetic Data Generation in Grammatical Error Detection
[NLP-8] 语法错误检测中合成数据生成的零镜头跨语言传输

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11854
作者: Gaetan Lopez Latouche,Marc-André Carbonneau,Ben Swanson
关键词: Grammatical Error Detection, Grammatical Error, Error Detection, GED, methods rely heavily
中文关键词: 语法错误检测，语法错误，错误检测，GED，方法严重依赖
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: Submitted to EMNLP 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Grammatical Error Detection (GED) methods rely heavily on human annotated error corpora. However, these annotations are unavailable in many low-resource languages. In this paper, we investigate GED in this context. Leveraging the zero-shot cross-lingual transfer capabilities of multilingual pre-trained language models, we train a model using data from a diverse set of languages to generate synthetic errors in other languages. These synthetic error corpora are then used to train a GED model. Specifically we propose a two-stage fine-tuning pipeline where the GED model is first fine-tuned on multilingual synthetic data from target languages followed by fine-tuning on human-annotated GED corpora from source languages. This approach outperforms current state-of-the-art annotation-free GED methods. We also analyse the errors produced by our method and other strong baselines, finding that our approach produces errors that are more diverse and more similar to human errors.
摘要：语法错误检测（GED）方法严重依赖于人类注释错误库。然而，这些注释在许多低资源语言中不可用。在本文中，我们在这种背景下研究了GED。利用多语言预训练语言模型的零镜头跨语言传输能力，我们使用来自不同语言集的数据训练模型，以生成其他语言的合成错误。然后使用这些合成误差库来训练GED模型。具体来说，我们提出了一个两阶段微调管道，其中GED模型首先对来自目标语言的多语言合成数据进行微调，然后对来自源语言的人类注释GED库进行微调。这种方法优于当前最先进的无注释GED方法。我们还分析了我们的方法和其他强基线产生的错误，发现我们的方法产生的错误更加多样化，更类似于人为错误。

[NLP-9] InferAct: Inferring Safe Actions for LLM-Based Agents Through Preemptive Evaluation and Human Feedback
[NLP-9] InferAct：通过先发制人的评估和人类反馈为基于LLM的代理推断安全行动

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11843
作者: Haishuo Fang,Xiaodan Zhu,Iryna Gurevych
关键词: deploying LLM-based agents, crucial requirement, requirement for deploying, deploying LLM-based, real-life applications
中文关键词: 部署基于LLM的代理，关键要求，部署的要求，部署基于LLM的现实应用程序
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:A crucial requirement for deploying LLM-based agents in real-life applications is robustness against risky or irreversible mistakes. However, existing research lacks a focus on the preemptive evaluation of reasoning trajectories performed by LLM agents, leading to a gap in ensuring safe and reliable operations. To explore better solutions, this paper introduces InferAct, a novel approach that leverages the Theory-of-Mind capability of LLMs to proactively detect potential errors before critical actions are executed (e.g., “buy-now” in automatic online trading or web shopping). InferAct is also capable of integrating human feedback to prevent irreversible risks and enhance the actor agent’s decision-making process. Experiments on three widely used tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of InferAct. The proposed solution presents a novel approach and concrete contributions toward developing LLM agents that can be safely deployed in different environments involving critical decision-making.
摘要：在实际应用中部署基于LLM的代理的一个关键要求是对风险或不可逆转的错误具有健壮性。然而，现有的研究缺乏对LLM代理执行的推理轨迹的先发制人评估，导致在确保安全可靠操作方面存在差距。为了探索更好的解决方案，本文引入了InferAct，这是一种新的方法，它利用LLMS的心理理论能力在执行关键操作之前主动检测潜在的错误(例如，自动在线交易或网上购物中的“立即购买”)。InferAct还能够整合人类反馈，以防止不可逆转的风险，并增强行动者代理人的决策过程。在三个广泛使用的任务上的实验证明了InferAct的有效性。建议的解决方案为开发LLM代理提供了一种新的方法和具体贡献，这些代理可以安全地部署在涉及关键决策的不同环境中。

[NLP-10] LoFTI: Localization and Factuality Transfer to Indian Locales
[NLP-10] LoFTI：本地化和事实转移到印度地区

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11833
作者: Sona Elza Simon(1),Soumen Kumar Mondal(1),Abhishek Singhania(2),Sayambhu Sen(2),Preethi Jyothi(1) ((1) Indian Institute of Technology Bombay, (2) Amazon Alexa)
关键词: large web-scale datasets, encode vast amounts, world knowledge acquired, Large language models, web-scale datasets crawled
中文关键词: 大型网络规模数据集、编码大量、获得的世界知识、大型语言模型、抓取的网络规模数据集
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: 21 pages

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large language models (LLMs) encode vast amounts of world knowledge acquired via training on large web-scale datasets crawled from the internet. However, these datasets typically exhibit a geographical bias towards English-speaking Western countries. This results in LLMs producing biased or hallucinated responses to queries that require answers localized to other geographical regions. In this work, we introduce a new benchmark named LoFTI (Localization and Factuality Transfer to Indian Locales) that can be used to evaluate an LLM’s localization and factual text transfer capabilities. LoFTI consists of factual statements about entities in source and target locations; the source locations are spread across the globe and the target locations are all within India with varying degrees of hyperlocality (country, states, cities). The entities span a wide variety of categories. We use LoFTI to evaluate Mixtral, GPT-4 and two other Mixtral-based approaches well-suited to the task of localized factual transfer. We demonstrate that LoFTI is a high-quality evaluation benchmark and all the models, including GPT-4, produce skewed results across varying levels of hyperlocality.
摘要：大型语言模型(LLM)编码了通过对从互联网上抓取的大规模网络数据集进行训练而获得的海量世界知识。然而，这些数据集通常显示出对讲英语的西方国家的地理偏见。这导致LLMS对需要本地化到其他地理区域的答案的查询产生偏颇或幻觉的响应。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个名为LOFTI(本地化和事实转移到印度地区)的新基准，该基准可以用来评估LLM的本地化和事实文本转移能力。LOFTI包括关于源位置和目标位置的实体的事实陈述；源位置分布在全球，目标位置都在印度境内，具有不同程度的超局部性(国家、州、城市)。这些实体涵盖了各种各样的类别。我们使用Lofti来评估Mixtral、GPT-4和其他两种基于Mixtral的方法，这些方法非常适合于本地化事实转移的任务。我们证明了LOFTI是一个高质量的评估基准，所有的模型，包括GPT-4，在不同级别的超局部性上产生不对称的结果。

[NLP-11] GPT Assisted Annotation of Rhetorical and Linguistic Features for Interpretable Propaganda Technique Detection in News Text
[NLP-11] GPT辅助诠释新闻文本中可解释宣传技术检测的修辞和语言特征

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11827
作者: Kyle Hamilton,Luca Longo,Bojan Bozic
关键词: garnered considerable attention, opaque inner workings, data set labeled, machine learning, data
中文关键词: 引起了相当大的关注、不透明的内部工作、标记的数据集、机器学习、数据
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:While the use of machine learning for the detection of propaganda techniques in text has garnered considerable attention, most approaches focus on “black-box” solutions with opaque inner workings. Interpretable approaches provide a solution, however, they depend on careful feature engineering and costly expert annotated data. Additionally, language features specific to propagandistic text are generally the focus of rhetoricians or linguists, and there is no data set labeled with such features suitable for machine learning. This study codifies 22 rhetorical and linguistic features identified in literature related to the language of persuasion for the purpose of annotating an existing data set labeled with propaganda techniques. To help human experts annotate natural language sentences with these features, RhetAnn, a web application, was specifically designed to minimize an otherwise considerable mental effort. Finally, a small set of annotated data was used to fine-tune GPT-3.5, a generative large language model (LLM), to annotate the remaining data while optimizing for financial cost and classification accuracy. This study demonstrates how combining a small number of human annotated examples with GPT can be an effective strategy for scaling the annotation process at a fraction of the cost of traditional annotation relying solely on human experts. The results are on par with the best performing model at the time of writing, namely GPT-4, at 10x less the cost. Our contribution is a set of features, their properties, definitions, and examples in a machine-readable format, along with the code for RhetAnn and the GPT prompts and fine-tuning procedures for advancing state-of-the-art interpretable propaganda technique detection.
摘要：虽然利用机器学习来检测文本中的宣传技巧已经引起了相当大的关注，但大多数方法都集中在内部工作原理不透明的黑盒解决方案上。可解释的方法提供了一个解决方案，然而，它们依赖于仔细的特征工程和昂贵的专家注释数据。此外，特定于宣传性文本的语言特征通常是修辞学家或语言学家关注的焦点，目前还没有适合于机器学习的带有此类特征的数据集。本研究对文献中与劝说语言相关的22个修辞和语言特征进行了编纂，目的是对现有的带有宣传技巧的数据集进行注释。为了帮助人类专家用这些功能注释自然语言句子，一款名为RhetAnn的网络应用程序专门设计，以最大限度地减少原本相当大的脑力劳动。最后，使用一小部分带注释的数据对GPT-3.5进行微调，GPT-3.5是一个生成式大型语言模型(LLM)，用于注释剩余的数据，同时优化财务成本和分类精度。这项研究展示了如何将少量的人工标注示例与GPT相结合，以仅需少量人工专家支持的传统标注成本的一小部分来扩展标注过程。结果与撰写本文时性能最好的模型(即GPT-4)不相上下，成本要低10倍。我们的贡献是以机器可读的格式提供了一组功能、它们的属性、定义和示例，以及RhetAnn的代码和GPT提示以及用于推进最先进的可解释宣传技术检测的微调程序。

[NLP-12] PipeInfer: Accelerating LLM Inference using Asynchronous Pipelined Speculation
[NLP-12] PipeInfer：使用同步流水线推测加速LLM推理

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11798
作者: Branden Butler,Sixing Yu,Arya Mazaheri,Ali Jannesari
关键词: Large Language Models, Language Models, Large Language, CPU speculative execution, inspiration from CPU
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、语言模型、大型语言、中央处理器推测执行、来自中央处理器的灵感
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Distributed, Parallel, and Cluster Computing (cs.DC); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: 11 pages, submitted to SC24 conference

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Inference of Large Language Models (LLMs) across computer clusters has become a focal point of research in recent times, with many acceleration techniques taking inspiration from CPU speculative execution. These techniques reduce bottlenecks associated with memory bandwidth, but also increase end-to-end latency per inference run, requiring high speculation acceptance rates to improve performance. Combined with a variable rate of acceptance across tasks, speculative inference techniques can result in reduced performance. Additionally, pipeline-parallel designs require many user requests to maintain maximum utilization. As a remedy, we propose PipeInfer, a pipelined speculative acceleration technique to reduce inter-token latency and improve system utilization for single-request scenarios while also improving tolerance to low speculation acceptance rates and low-bandwidth interconnects. PipeInfer exhibits up to a 2.15 \times improvement in generation speed over standard speculative inference. PipeInfer achieves its improvement through Continuous Asynchronous Speculation and Early Inference Cancellation, the former improving latency and generation speed by running single-token inference simultaneously with several speculative runs, while the latter improves speed and latency by skipping the computation of invalidated runs, even in the middle of inference.
摘要：跨机群的大语言模型推理已成为近年来的研究热点，许多加速技术都是从CPU推测执行中获得灵感的。这些技术减少了与内存带宽相关的瓶颈，但也增加了每次推理运行的端到端延迟，需要较高的推测接受率来提高性能。与跨任务的可变接受率相结合，推测性推理技术可能导致性能下降。此外，流水线并行设计需要许多用户请求才能保持最大利用率。作为补救措施，我们提出了PipeInfer，这是一种流水线推测加速技术，可以减少令牌之间的延迟，提高单请求场景的系统利用率，同时还可以提高对低推测接受率和低带宽互连的容忍度。与标准的推测推理相比，PipeInfer的生成速度提高了2.15倍。PipeInfer通过连续异步推理和早期推理取消来实现改进，前者通过同时运行单令牌推理和多次推理来提高延迟和生成速度，而后者通过跳过无效运行的计算来提高速度和延迟，即使在推理过程中也是如此。

[NLP-13] Large Language Models as Misleading Assistants in Conversation
[NLP-13] 大型语言模型在对话中充当误导助手

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11789
作者: Betty Li Hou,Kejian Shi,Jason Phang,James Aung,Steven Adler,Rosie Campbell
关键词: Large Language Models, Large Language, Language Models, wide range, range of information-seeking
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，大型语言，语言模型，广泛，信息寻求范围
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computers and Society (cs.CY)
备注: Next Generation of AI Safety Workshop, 41st International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2024)

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models (LLMs) are able to provide assistance on a wide range of information-seeking tasks. However, model outputs may be misleading, whether unintentionally or in cases of intentional deception. We investigate the ability of LLMs to be deceptive in the context of providing assistance on a reading comprehension task, using LLMs as proxies for human users. We compare outcomes of (1) when the model is prompted to provide truthful assistance, (2) when it is prompted to be subtly misleading, and (3) when it is prompted to argue for an incorrect answer. Our experiments show that GPT-4 can effectively mislead both GPT-3.5-Turbo and GPT-4, with deceptive assistants resulting in up to a 23% drop in accuracy on the task compared to when a truthful assistant is used. We also find that providing the user model with additional context from the passage partially mitigates the influence of the deceptive model. This work highlights the ability of LLMs to produce misleading information and the effects this may have in real-world situations.
摘要：大型语言模型能够在广泛的信息搜索任务中提供帮助。然而，无论是无意的还是有意的欺骗，模型输出都可能具有误导性。我们使用LLMS作为人类用户的代理，考察了LLMS在帮助阅读理解任务的背景下具有欺骗性的能力。我们比较(1)当模型被提示提供真实的帮助时，(2)当它被提示具有微妙的误导性时，以及(3)当它被提示为不正确的答案时的结果。我们的实验表明，GPT-4可以有效地误导GPT-3.5-Turbo和GPT-4，与使用真实助手相比，欺骗性助手导致任务的准确率下降高达23%。我们还发现，为用户模型提供来自段落的额外上下文部分地缓解了欺骗性模型的影响。这项工作突出了低收入者产生误导性信息的能力，以及这在现实世界中可能产生的影响。

[NLP-14] SwitchCIT: Switching for Continual Instruction Tuning of Large Language Models
[NLP-14] Switch CIT：转换为大型语言模型的连续教学调优

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11780
作者: Xinbo Wu,Max Hartman,Vidhata Arjun Jayaraman,Lav R. Varshney
关键词: exhibited impressive capabilities, general language understanding, Large language models, Large language, exhibited impressive
中文关键词: 表现出令人印象深刻的能力、一般语言理解、大型语言模型、大型语言，表现出令人印象深刻的能力
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large language models (LLMs) have exhibited impressive capabilities in various domains, particularly in general language understanding. However these models, trained on massive text data, may not be finely optimized for specific tasks triggered by instructions. Continual instruction tuning is crucial to adapt LLMs to evolving tasks and domains, ensuring their effectiveness and relevance across a wide range of applications. In the context of continual instruction tuning, where models are sequentially trained on different tasks, catastrophic forgetting can occur, leading to performance degradation on previously learned tasks. This work addresses the catastrophic forgetting in continual instruction learning for LLMs through a switching mechanism for routing computations to parameter-efficient tuned models. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method through experiments on continual instruction tuning of different natural language generation tasks.
摘要：大型语言模型（LLM）在各个领域表现出令人印象深刻的能力，尤其是在通用语言理解方面。然而，这些基于大量文本数据训练的模型可能无法针对指令触发的特定任务进行精细优化。持续的教学调整对于使LLM适应不断变化的任务和领域至关重要，确保其在广泛应用中的有效性和相关性。在持续指令调整的背景下，模型在不同的任务上顺序训练，可能会发生灾难性的遗忘，导致之前学习的任务的性能下降。这项工作通过将计算路由到参数高效的调整模型的切换机制来解决LLM持续指令学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。我们通过对不同自然语言生成任务进行持续指令调整的实验来证明我们方法的有效性。

[NLP-15] Sharif-MGTD at SemEval-2024 Task 8: A Transformer-Based Approach to Detect Machine Generated Text
[NLP-15] Sharif-MGTD参加SemEval-2024任务8：基于转换器的检测机器生成文本的方法

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11774
作者: Seyedeh Fatemeh Ebrahimi,Karim Akhavan Azari,Amirmasoud Iravani,Arian Qazvini,Pouya Sadeghi,Zeinab Sadat Taghavi,Hossein Sameti
关键词: Natural Language Processing, Detecting Machine-Generated Text, Detecting Machine-Generated, Language Processing, Natural Language
中文关键词: 自然语言处理、检测机器生成文本、检测机器生成、语言处理、自然语言
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: 8 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables. Proceedings of the 18th International Workshop on Semantic Evaluation (SemEval-2024)

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Detecting Machine-Generated Text (MGT) has emerged as a significant area of study within Natural Language Processing. While language models generate text, they often leave discernible traces, which can be scrutinized using either traditional feature-based methods or more advanced neural language models. In this research, we explore the effectiveness of fine-tuning a RoBERTa-base transformer, a powerful neural architecture, to address MGT detection as a binary classification task. Focusing specifically on Subtask A (Monolingual-English) within the SemEval-2024 competition framework, our proposed system achieves an accuracy of 78.9% on the test dataset, positioning us at 57th among participants. Our study addresses this challenge while considering the limited hardware resources, resulting in a system that excels at identifying human-written texts but encounters challenges in accurately discerning MGTs.
摘要：检测机器生成文本（MGT）已成为自然语言处理领域的一个重要研究领域。虽然语言模型生成文本，但它们通常会留下明显的痕迹，可以使用传统的基于特征的方法或更先进的神经语言模型来仔细检查这些痕迹。在这项研究中，我们探索了微调RoBERTa基Transformer（一种强大的神经架构）的有效性，以将MGT检测作为二进制分类任务来解决。我们提出的系统特别关注SemEval-2024竞赛框架内的子任务A（单语-英语），在测试数据集上实现了78.9%的准确率，在参与者中排名第57位。我们的研究在考虑到硬件资源有限的情况下解决了这一挑战，从而开发出了一个擅长识别人类书面文本的系统，但在准确识别MGT方面遇到了挑战。

[NLP-16] Educational Personalized Learning Path Planning with Large Language Models
[NLP-16] 利用大型语言模型进行教育个性化学习路径规划

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11773
作者: Chee Ng,Yuen Fung
关键词: Learning Path Planning, Educational Personalized Learning, tailor learning experiences, Path Planning, Large Language Models
中文关键词: 学习路径规划、教育个性化学习、定制学习体验、路径规划、大型语言模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 6 pages

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Educational Personalized Learning Path Planning (PLPP) aims to tailor learning experiences to individual learners’ needs, enhancing learning efficiency and engagement. Despite its potential, traditional PLPP systems often lack adaptability, interactivity, and transparency. This paper proposes a novel approach integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) with prompt engineering to address these challenges. By designing prompts that incorporate learner-specific information, our method guides LLMs like LLama-2-70B and GPT-4 to generate personalized, coherent, and pedagogically sound learning paths. We conducted experiments comparing our method with a baseline approach across various metrics, including accuracy, user satisfaction, and the quality of learning paths. The results show significant improvements in all areas, particularly with GPT-4, demonstrating the effectiveness of prompt engineering in enhancing PLPP. Additional long-term impact analysis further validates our method’s potential to improve learner performance and retention. This research highlights the promise of LLMs and prompt engineering in advancing personalized education.
摘要：教育个性化学习路径规划(PLPP)旨在根据个体学习者的需求定制学习体验，提高学习效率和参与度。尽管有潜力，传统的PLPP系统往往缺乏适应性、互动性和透明度。本文提出了一种将大型语言模型(LLM)与快速工程相结合的新方法来解决这些挑战。通过设计包含学习者特定信息的提示，我们的方法引导LLMS(如LLAMA-2-70B和GPT-4)生成个性化、连贯和教学上合理的学习路径。我们进行了实验，将我们的方法与基线方法在各种指标上进行了比较，包括准确性、用户满意度和学习路径的质量。结果表明，在所有领域都有显著的改善，特别是使用GPT-4，证明了快速工程在加强PLPP方面的有效性。额外的长期影响分析进一步验证了我们的方法在提高学习者表现和留存力方面的潜力。这项研究突出了LLMS在推进个性化教育方面的前景和促进工程。

[NLP-17] Robust Utility-Preserving Text Anonymization Based on Large Language Models
[NLP-17] 基于大型语言模型的鲁棒性保留效用的文本解析

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11770
作者: Tianyu Yang,Xiaodan Zhu,Iryna Gurevych
关键词: sharing sensitive data, Large Language Models, Text anonymization, crucial for sharing, sharing sensitive
中文关键词: 共享敏感数据、大型语言模型、文本匿名化，对于共享至关重要，共享敏感
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Text anonymization is crucial for sharing sensitive data while maintaining privacy. Existing techniques face the emerging challenges of re-identification attack ability of Large Language Models (LLMs), which have shown advanced capability in memorizing detailed information and patterns as well as connecting disparate pieces of information. In defending against LLM-based re-identification attacks, anonymization could jeopardize the utility of the resulting anonymized data in downstream tasks – the trade-off between privacy and data utility requires deeper understanding within the context of LLMs. This paper proposes a framework composed of three LLM-based components – a privacy evaluator, a utility evaluator, and an optimization component, which work collaboratively to perform anonymization. To provide a practical model for large-scale and real-time environments, we distill the anonymization capabilities into a lightweight model using Direct Preference Optimization (DPO). Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed models outperform baseline models, showing robustness in reducing the risk of re-identification while preserving greater data utility in downstream tasks. Our code and dataset are available at this https URL.
摘要：文本匿名化对于在共享敏感数据的同时保护隐私至关重要。现有技术面临着大型语言模型(LLM)重新识别攻击能力的新挑战，LLM在记忆详细信息和模式以及连接不同的信息片段方面显示出先进的能力。在防御基于LLM的重新识别攻击时，匿名化可能会危及产生的匿名数据在下游任务中的效用–隐私和数据效用之间的权衡需要在LLM的背景下更深入地理解。本文提出了一个由三个基于LLM的组件–隐私评估器、效用评估器和优化组件组成的框架，它们协同工作来执行匿名化。为了提供一个适用于大规模实时环境的实用模型，我们使用直接偏好优化(DPO)将匿名化能力提炼成一个轻量级模型。大量的实验表明，所提出的模型优于基线模型，在降低重新识别风险的同时，在下游任务中保持了更大的数据效用。我们的代码和数据集可以在这个HTTPS URL上找到。

[NLP-18] Vectoring Languages
[NLP-18] 引导语言

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11766
作者: Joseph Chen
关键词: Recent breakthroughs, large language models, global attention, stirred up global, accelerating non-stop
中文关键词: 最近的突破，大语言模型，全球关注，搅动全球，加速不断
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: 12 pages including references

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Recent breakthroughs in large language models (LLM) have stirred up global attention, and the research has been accelerating non-stop since then. Philosophers and psychologists have also been researching the structure of language for decades, but they are having a hard time finding a theory that directly benefits from the breakthroughs of LLMs. In this article, we propose a novel structure of language that reflects well on the mechanisms behind language models and go on to show that this structure is also better at capturing the diverse nature of language compared to previous methods. An analogy of linear algebra is adapted to strengthen the basis of this perspective. We further argue about the difference between this perspective and the design philosophy for current language models. Lastly, we discuss how this perspective can lead us to research directions that may accelerate the improvements of science fastest.
摘要：大型语言模型（LLM）最近的突破引起了全球关注，此后研究不断加速。哲学家和心理学家几十年来一直在研究语言结构，但他们很难找到一种直接受益于法学硕士突破的理论。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的语言结构，它很好地反映了语言模型背后的机制，并进一步表明，与以前的方法相比，这种结构也更好地捕捉语言的多样性。线性代数的类比被改编来加强这一观点的基础。我们进一步讨论了这种观点与当前语言模型的设计理念之间的差异。最后，我们讨论了这种观点如何引导我们找到最快加速科学进步的研究方向。

[NLP-19] How Are LLMs Mitigating Stereotyping Harms? Learning from Search Engine Studies
[NLP-19] LLM如何减轻刻板印象危害？从搜索引擎研究中学习

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11733
作者: Alina Leidinger,Richard Rogers
关键词: increased public scrutiny, commercial model development, public scrutiny, widespread availability, release of ChatGPT
中文关键词: 增加公众审查、商业模式开发、公众审查、广泛可用性、ChatGPT的发布
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Accepted at AAAI/ACM AI, Ethics, and Society

点击查看摘要

Abstract:With the widespread availability of LLMs since the release of ChatGPT and increased public scrutiny, commercial model development appears to have focused their efforts on ‘safety’ training concerning legal liabilities at the expense of social impact evaluation. This mimics a similar trend which we could observe for search engine autocompletion some years prior. We draw on scholarship from NLP and search engine auditing and present a novel evaluation task in the style of autocompletion prompts to assess stereotyping in LLMs. We assess LLMs by using four metrics, namely refusal rates, toxicity, sentiment and regard, with and without safety system prompts. Our findings indicate an improvement to stereotyping outputs with the system prompt, but overall a lack of attention by LLMs under study to certain harms classified as toxic, particularly for prompts about peoples/ethnicities and sexual orientation. Mentions of intersectional identities trigger a disproportionate amount of stereotyping. Finally, we discuss the implications of these findings about stereotyping harms in light of the coming intermingling of LLMs and search and the choice of stereotyping mitigation policy to adopt. We address model builders, academics, NLP practitioners and policy makers, calling for accountability and awareness concerning stereotyping harms, be it for training data curation, leader board design and usage, or social impact measurement.
摘要：自ChatGPT发布以来，随着LLM的广泛使用和公众监督的增加，商业模式的开发似乎将重点放在了关于法律责任的“安全”培训上，而忽视了社会影响评估。这模仿了几年前我们可以观察到的搜索引擎自动完成的类似趋势。我们借鉴自然语言处理和搜索引擎审计的研究成果，提出了一种基于自动补全提示的评估任务，用于评估低成本管理系统中的刻板印象。我们使用拒绝率、毒性、情绪和关注度四个指标来评估低成本管理，包括有和没有安全系统提示。我们的发现表明，随着系统提示，刻板印象的输出有所改善，但总体上，正在研究的低收入管理人员缺乏对某些被归类为有毒的危害的关注，特别是关于民族/种族和性取向的提示。提到跨界别的身份会引发不成比例的刻板印象。最后，我们根据即将到来的LLMS和搜索的混合以及要采取的刻板印象缓解政策的选择，讨论了这些发现对刻板印象危害的影响。我们面向模型建造者、学者、NLP从业者和政策制定者，呼吁对刻板印象的危害负责并提高认识，无论是用于培训数据管理、排行榜设计和使用，还是社会影响衡量。

[NLP-20] CCoE: A Compact LLM with Collaboration of Experts
[NLP-20] CCoE：专家合作的紧凑型法学硕士

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11686
作者: Shaomang Huang,Jianfeng Pan,Hanzhong Zheng
关键词: natural language understanding, Large Language Model, demonstrate significant capabilities, natural language, language understanding
中文关键词: 自然语言理解，大型语言模型，展示了显着的能力，自然语言，语言理解
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: 15 pages

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In the domain of Large Language Model (LLM), LLMs demonstrate significant capabilities in natural language understanding and generation. With the growing needs of applying LLMs on various domains, it is a research question that how to efficiently train and build a model that has expertise in different domains but with a low training cost. We propose CCoE architecture, a framework of easily coupling multiple strong domain experts together to fuse into a big LLM, provides a collective way of utilizing the different domain expert LLMs. Besides, training a large collaborative of multiple expert LLMs requires a high requirements on training sources. CCoE bypasses this problem through isolating other experts and train each expert separately. The design of CCoE assembles multiple expert LLMs through the CoE (Collaboration of Experts) layer. Each CoE layer could have one or more expert LLMs. Expert LLMs have different number of layers and have been well-trained for different domain tasks. Each expert is fine-tuned to be able to achieve the comparable results with SOTA domain LLMs. We start from 5 experts in the domain of Code, Math, Law, text-to-SQL and Medical. The results indicate that our CCoE framework can easily and efficiently boost nearly 10%-20% performance on original base model in different domains but using less resources on training, as well as inference.
摘要：在大语言模型领域，大语言模型在自然语言理解和生成方面表现出了显著的能力。随着LLMS在各个领域的应用需求日益增长，如何有效地训练和构建一个具有不同领域专业知识但培训成本较低的模型是一个研究问题。我们提出了CCoE体系结构，将多个强领域专家很容易地耦合在一起，融合成一个大的LLM，提供了一个集合使用不同领域专家LLM的方式。此外，训练一个由多个专家组成的大型协作学习模型对训练源的要求也很高。CCoE通过隔离其他专家来绕过这个问题，并对每个专家进行单独培训。CCoE的设计通过专家协作(COE)层将多个专家LLM组装在一起。每个COE层可以有一个或多个专家LLM。专家LLM具有不同的层数，并针对不同的领域任务进行了良好的培训。每个专家都进行了微调，以便能够获得与SOTA域LLM相当的结果。我们从代码、数学、法律、文本到SQL和医学领域的5位专家开始。结果表明，我们的CCoE框架可以在不同领域的原始基本模型上轻松有效地提高近10%-20%的性能，而在训练和推理方面使用的资源更少。

[NLP-21] MINI-LLM: Memory-Efficient Structured Pruning for Large Language Models
[NLP-21] MINI-LLM：大型语言模型的内存高效结构化修剪

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11681
作者: Hongrong Cheng,Miao Zhang,Javen Qinfeng Shi
关键词: Large Language Models, Large Language, Language Models, Models, grow dramatically
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，大型语言，语言模型，模型，急剧增长
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 13 pages

点击查看摘要

Abstract:As Large Language Models (LLMs) grow dramatically in size, there is an increasing trend in compressing and speeding up these models. Previous studies have highlighted the usefulness of gradients for importance scoring in neural network compressing, especially in pruning medium-size networks. However, the substantial memory requirements involved in calculating gradients with backpropagation impede the utilization of gradients in guiding LLM pruning. As a result, most pruning strategies for LLMs rely on gradient-free criteria, such as weight magnitudes or a mix of magnitudes and activations. In this paper, we devise a hybrid pruning criterion, which appropriately integrates magnitude, activation, and gradient to capitalize on feature map sensitivity for pruning LLMs. To overcome memory requirement barriers, we estimate gradients using only forward passes. Based on this, we propose a Memory-effIcieNt structured prunIng procedure for LLMs (MINI-LLM) to remove no-critical channels and multi-attention heads. Experimental results demonstrate the superior performance of MINI-LLM over existing gradient-free methods on three LLMs: LLaMA, BLOOM, and OPT across various downstream tasks (classification, multiple-choice, and generation), while MINI-LLM maintains a GPU memory footprint akin to gradient-free methods.
摘要：随着大型语言模型(LLM)规模的急剧增长，压缩和加速这些模型的趋势越来越大。以前的研究已经强调了梯度在神经网络压缩中的重要性评分的用处，特别是在修剪中等规模的网络时。然而，利用反向传播计算梯度所涉及的大量内存需求阻碍了梯度在指导LLM修剪中的利用。因此，大多数LLM的剪枝策略依赖于无梯度的标准，例如重量大小或大小和激活的混合。在本文中，我们设计了一种混合剪枝准则，该准则适当地结合了幅度、激活和梯度来利用特征映射的敏感度来剪枝LLMS。为了克服内存要求的障碍，我们只使用正向传递来估计梯度。在此基础上，我们提出了一种内存高效的LLMS结构化剪枝过程(mini-LLM)来去除非关键通道和多注意头部。实验结果表明，mini-LLM在三种LLM上的性能优于现有的无梯度方法：骆驼、Bloom和OPT，跨越不同的下游任务(分类、多项选择和生成)，而mini-LLM保持了类似于无梯度方法的GPU内存占用。

[NLP-22] ECoh: Turn-level Coherence Evaluation for Multilingual Dialogues
[NLP-22] ECoh：多语言对话的回合级一致性评估

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11660
作者: John Mendonça,Isabel Trancoso,Alon Lavie
关键词: poses challenges, closed-source nature, Responses targeting Coherence, LLM generated dataset, Generated Responses targeting
中文关键词: 带来挑战、开源性质、针对一致性的响应、LLM生成的数据集、针对生成的响应
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Accepted to SIGDIAL 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Despite being heralded as the new standard for dialogue evaluation, the closed-source nature of GPT-4 poses challenges for the community. Motivated by the need for lightweight, open source, and multilingual dialogue evaluators, this paper introduces GenResCoh (Generated Responses targeting Coherence). GenResCoh is a novel LLM generated dataset comprising over 130k negative and positive responses and accompanying explanations seeded from XDailyDialog and XPersona covering English, French, German, Italian, and Chinese. Leveraging GenResCoh, we propose ECoh (Evaluation of Coherence), a family of evaluators trained to assess response coherence across multiple languages. Experimental results demonstrate that ECoh achieves multilingual detection capabilities superior to the teacher model (GPT-3.5-Turbo) on GenResCoh, despite being based on a much smaller architecture. Furthermore, the explanations provided by ECoh closely align in terms of quality with those generated by the teacher model.
摘要：尽管GPT-4被誉为对话评估的新标准，但它的封闭性给社区带来了挑战。基于对轻量级、开源和多语言对话评估器的需求，本文引入了GenResCoh(针对一致性的生成响应)。GenResCoh是一个新的LLM生成的数据集，包括来自XDailyDialog和XPersona的130k多个否定和肯定的回答和伴随的解释，涵盖英语、法语、德语、意大利语和汉语。利用GenResCoh，我们提出了ECoh(一致性评估)，这是一个经过培训的评估员家族，用于评估跨多语言的响应一致性。实验结果表明，尽管ECoh的体系结构要小得多，但它在GenResCoh上获得了优于教师模型(GPT-3.5-Turbo)的多语言检测能力。此外，ECoh提供的解释在质量方面与教师模式产生的解释非常一致。

[NLP-23] A Comprehensive Evaluation of Large Language Models on Temporal Event Forecasting
[NLP-23] 大型语言模型对时间事件预测的综合评价

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11638
作者: He Chang,Chenchen Ye,Zhulin Tao,Jie Wu,Zhengmao Yang,Yunshan Ma,Xianglin Huang,Tat-Seng Chua
关键词: Large Language Models, Large Language, Language Models, knowledge question answering, demonstrated great potential
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、大型语言、语言模型、知识问答，展现出巨大的潜力
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Information Retrieval (cs.IR)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Recently, Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated great potential in various data mining tasks, such as knowledge question answering, mathematical reasoning, and commonsense reasoning. However, the reasoning capability of LLMs on temporal event forecasting has been under-explored. To systematically investigate their abilities in temporal event forecasting, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation of LLM-based methods for temporal event forecasting. Due to the lack of a high-quality dataset that involves both graph and textual data, we first construct a benchmark dataset, named MidEast-TE-mini. Based on this dataset, we design a series of baseline methods, characterized by various input formats and retrieval augmented generation(RAG) modules. From extensive experiments, we find that directly integrating raw texts into the input of LLMs does not enhance zero-shot extrapolation performance. In contrast, incorporating raw texts in specific complex events and fine-tuning LLMs significantly improves performance. Moreover, enhanced with retrieval modules, LLM can effectively capture temporal relational patterns hidden in historical events. Meanwhile, issues such as popularity bias and the long-tail problem still persist in LLMs, particularly in the RAG-based method. These findings not only deepen our understanding of LLM-based event forecasting methods but also highlight several promising research directions.We consider that this comprehensive evaluation, along with the identified research opportunities, will significantly contribute to future research on temporal event forecasting through LLMs.
摘要：近年来，大语言模型在知识问答、数学推理、常识推理等数据挖掘任务中显示出巨大的潜力。然而，LLMS在时间事件预测上的推理能力一直没有得到充分的研究。为了系统地考察它们在时间事件预测方面的能力，我们对基于LLM的时间事件预测方法进行了全面的评估。由于缺乏同时包含图形和文本数据的高质量数据集，我们首先构建了一个基准数据集，命名为Mideast-TE-mini。基于这个数据集，我们设计了一系列的基线方法，其特点是不同的输入格式和检索增强生成(RAG)模块。从大量的实验中我们发现，直接将原始文本整合到LLMS的输入中并不能提高零镜头外推的性能。相比之下，在特定的复杂事件中合并原始文本并微调LLM可以显著提高性能。此外，LLM还增强了检索模块，可以有效地捕获隐藏在历史事件中的时态关系模式。与此同时，诸如受欢迎程度偏差和长尾问题等问题仍然存在于LLMS中，特别是在基于RAG的方法中。这些发现不仅加深了我们对基于LLM的事件预测方法的理解，而且突出了几个有前景的研究方向。我们认为，这种综合评估以及确定的研究机会将对未来通过LLMS进行时间事件预测的研究做出重要贡献。

[NLP-24] he Foundations of Tokenization: Statistical and Computational Concerns
[NLP-24] 代币化的基础：统计和计算问题

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11606
作者: Juan Luis Gastaldi,John Terilla,Luca Malagutti,Brian DuSell,Tim Vieira,Ryan Cotterell
关键词: NLP pipeline, practice of converting, converting strings, strings of characters, alphabet into sequences
中文关键词: NLP管道，转换实践，将字符串、字符串、字母表转换为序列
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Tokenization - the practice of converting strings of characters over an alphabet into sequences of tokens over a vocabulary - is a critical yet under-theorized step in the NLP pipeline. Notably, it remains the only major step not fully integrated into widely used end-to-end neural models. This paper aims to address this theoretical gap by laying the foundations of tokenization from a formal perspective. By articulating and extending basic properties about the category of stochastic maps, we propose a unified framework for representing and analyzing tokenizer models. This framework allows us to establish general conditions for the use of tokenizers. In particular, we formally establish the necessary and sufficient conditions for a tokenizer model to preserve the consistency of statistical estimators. Additionally, we discuss statistical and computational concerns crucial for the design and implementation of tokenizer models. The framework and results advanced in this paper represent a step toward a robust theoretical foundation for neural language modeling.
摘要：标记化–将字母表上的字符串转换成词汇表上的符号序列的实践–是NLP流水线中的一个关键但缺乏理论性的步骤。值得注意的是，它仍然是唯一没有完全整合到广泛使用的端到端神经模型中的重要步骤。本文旨在通过从形式的角度为标记化奠定基础来解决这一理论空白。通过阐述和扩展随机映射范畴的基本性质，我们提出了一个统一的表示和分析标记器模型的框架。这一框架使我们能够为使用令牌化器建立一般条件。特别地，我们正式地建立了令牌子模型保持统计估计相合性的充要条件。此外，我们还讨论了统计和计算方面的问题，这些问题对于记号器模型的设计和实现至关重要。本文提出的框架和结果代表了为神经语言建模奠定坚实的理论基础的一步。

[NLP-25] AdaptEval: Evaluating Large Language Models on Domain Adaptation for Text Summarization
[NLP-25] AdaptEval：评估文本摘要领域适应的大型语言模型

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11591
作者: Anum Afzal,Ribin Chalumattu,Florian Matthes,Laura Mascarell Espuny
关键词: Large Language Models, Language Models, Large Language, abstractive summarization task, summarization task
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、语言模型、大型语言、抽象摘要任务、摘要任务
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Despite the advances in the abstractive summarization task using Large Language Models (LLM), there is a lack of research that asses their abilities to easily adapt to different domains. We evaluate the domain adaptation abilities of a wide range of LLMs on the summarization task across various domains in both fine-tuning and in-context learning settings. We also present AdaptEval, the first domain adaptation evaluation suite. AdaptEval includes a domain benchmark and a set of metrics to facilitate the analysis of domain adaptation. Our results demonstrate that LLMs exhibit comparable performance in the in-context learning setting, regardless of their parameter scale.
摘要：尽管使用大型语言模型（LLM）的抽象摘要任务取得了进步，但缺乏评估其轻松适应不同领域能力的研究。我们在微调和上下文学习环境中评估了各种LLM在各个领域的总结任务中的领域适应能力。我们还推出了AdaptEval，第一个域适应评估套件。AdaptEval包括一个领域基准和一组指标，以促进领域适应的分析。我们的结果表明，无论其参数规模如何，LLM在上下文学习环境中都表现出相当的性能。

[NLP-26] Optimizing KV Cache Eviction in LLMs: Adaptive Allocation for Enhanced Budget Utilization
[NLP-26] 优化LLM中的KV缓存驱逐：自适应分配以增强预算利用率

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11550
作者: Yuan Feng,Junlin Lv,Yukun Cao,Xike Xie,S. Kevin Zhou
关键词: Large Language Models, Large Language, long sequences inference, Language Models, encounter efficiency limitations
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、大型语言、长序列推理、语言模型、遇到效率限制
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models have excelled in various fields but encounter efficiency limitations due to the extensive KV cache required for long sequences inference. Many efforts try to evict non-critical cache elements during runtime, thereby reducing cache size within a given memory budget while preserving generation quality. Our reexamination of their underlying principles discerns that prevailing strategies essentially aim to minimize an upper bound of eviction loss within a specific budget allocation. However, we observe that the current practice of uniformly allocating budgets across different attention heads during the eviction procedure tends to degrade the quality of generation posten-eviction. In light of these findings, we propose a simple yet effective adaptive allocation algorithm that not only theoretically ensures its loss upper bound does not exceed that of previous uniform allocation methods, but also effectively aligns with the characteristics of the self-attention mechanism, thus practically reducing the upper bound. Further, integrating this algorithm with two of the most advanced methods yields Ada-SnapKV and Ada-Pyramid. Extensive experimental validation across 16 datasets and the Needle-in-a-Haystack test confirm that Ada-SnapKV and Ada-Pyramid achieve further enhancements, establishing new benchmarks in state-of-the-art performance.
摘要：大型语言模型在各个领域都表现出色，但由于长序列推理需要大量的KV缓存，因此效率受到限制。许多努力都试图在运行时清除非关键的缓存元素，从而在给定的内存预算内减少缓存大小，同时保持生成质量。我们对其基本原则的重新审查发现，现行战略基本上旨在将具体预算拨款内的驱逐损失上限降至最低。然而，我们注意到，目前在逐出程序中将预算统一分配给不同关注者的做法往往会降低一代人后逐出的质量。根据这些发现，我们提出了一种简单而有效的自适应分配算法，该算法不仅在理论上保证了其损失上限不超过以往的均匀分配方法，而且有效地符合自我注意机制的特点，从而实际地降低了上限。此外，将该算法与两种最先进的方法相结合，得到Ada-SnapKV和Ada-金字塔。对16个数据集的广泛实验验证和干草堆针测试证实，Ada-SnapKV和Ada-金字塔实现了进一步的增强，在最先进的性能方面建立了新的基准。

[NLP-27] How Personality Traits Influence Negotiation Outcomes? A Simulation based on Large Language Models
[NLP-27] 性格特征如何影响谈判结果？基于大型语言模型的模拟

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11549
作者: Yin Jou Huang,Rafik Hadfi
关键词: Psychological evidence reveals, Psychological evidence, Large Language Model, personality traits, Psychological
中文关键词: 心理证据揭示，心理证据，大语言模型，性格特征，心理
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: 13 pages, 4 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Psychological evidence reveals the influence of personality traits on decision-making. For instance, agreeableness is generally associated with positive outcomes in negotiations, whereas neuroticism is often linked to less favorable outcomes. This paper introduces a simulation framework centered on Large Language Model (LLM) agents endowed with synthesized personality traits. The agents negotiate within bargaining domains and possess customizable personalities and objectives. The experimental results show that the behavioral tendencies of LLM-based simulations could reproduce behavioral patterns observed in human negotiations. The contribution is twofold. First, we propose a simulation methodology that investigates the alignment between the linguistic and economic capabilities of LLM agents. Secondly, we offer empirical insights into the strategic impact of Big-Five personality traits on the outcomes of bilateral negotiations. We also provide a case study based on synthesized bargaining dialogues to reveal intriguing behaviors, including deceitful and compromising behaviors.
摘要：心理学证据揭示了人格特质对决策的影响。例如，和蔼可亲通常与谈判中的积极结果有关，而神经质往往与不太有利的结果有关。本文介绍了一个以具有综合人格特征的大语言模型(LLM)代理为中心的仿真框架。代理在讨价还价的领域内进行谈判，并拥有可定制的个性和目标。实验结果表明，基于LLM的模拟行为倾向可以再现人类谈判中观察到的行为模式。贡献是双重的。首先，我们提出了一种模拟方法，调查LLM代理的语言能力和经济能力之间的一致性。其次，我们提供了关于五大人格特质对双边谈判结果的战略影响的经验见解。我们还提供了一个基于合成讨价还价对话的案例研究，揭示了有趣的行为，包括欺骗和妥协行为。

[NLP-28] Fine-Tuning Medical Language Models for Enhanced Long-Contextual Understanding and Domain Expertise
[NLP-28] 微调医学语言模型以增强长期上下文理解和领域专业知识

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11536
作者: Qimin Yang,Rongsheng Wang,Jiexin Chen,Runqi Su,Tao Tan
关键词: Large Language Models, Large Language, widely applied, Language Models, specific domain knowledge
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，大型语言，广泛应用，语言模型，特定领域知识
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: 5 pages, 1 figure. Accepted by the Workshop on Long-Context Foundation Models (LCFM) at ICML 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models (LLMs) have been widely applied in various professional fields. By fine-tuning the models using domain specific question and answer datasets, the professional domain knowledge and Q\A abilities of these models have significantly improved, for example, medical professional LLMs that use fine-tuning of doctor-patient Q\A data exhibit extraordinary disease diagnostic abilities. However, we observed that despite improvements in specific domain knowledge, the performance of medical LLM in long-context understanding has significantly declined, especially compared to general language models with similar parameters. The purpose of this study is to investigate the phenomenon of reduced performance in understanding long-context in medical LLM. We designed a series of experiments to conduct open-book professional knowledge exams on all models to evaluate their ability to read long-context. By adjusting the proportion and quantity of general data and medical data in the process of fine-tuning, we can determine the best data composition to optimize the professional model and achieve a balance between long-context performance and specific domain knowledge.
摘要：大语言模型在各个专业领域得到了广泛的应用。通过使用特定领域的问答数据集对模型进行微调，这些模型的专业领域知识和问答能力得到了显著提高，例如，使用医患问答数据微调的医学专业LLMS表现出非凡的疾病诊断能力。然而，我们观察到，尽管特定领域的知识有所改善，但医学LLM在长上下文理解方面的性能显著下降，特别是与具有类似参数的一般语言模型相比。这项研究的目的是调查医学LLM中理解长背景的成绩下降的现象。我们设计了一系列实验，对所有模型进行开卷专业知识测试，以评估他们阅读长上下文的能力。通过在微调过程中调整通用数据和医疗数据的比例和数量，确定最佳的数据构成，优化专业模型，实现长语境表现和特定领域知识之间的平衡。

[NLP-29] Reasoning with Large Language Models a Survey
[NLP-29] 使用大型语言模型推理的调查

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11511
作者: Aske Plaat,Annie Wong,Suzan Verberne,Joost Broekens,Niki van Stein,Thomas Back
关键词: allowing instruction tuning, allowing instruction, billions of parameters, parameters has opened, opened up possibilities
中文关键词: 允许指令调优，允许指令，数十亿个参数，参数已经打开，打开了可能性
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Scaling up language models to billions of parameters has opened up possibilities for in-context learning, allowing instruction tuning and few-shot learning on tasks that the model was not specifically trained for. This has achieved breakthrough performance on language tasks such as translation, summarization, and question-answering. Furthermore, in addition to these associative “System 1” tasks, recent advances in Chain-of-thought prompt learning have demonstrated strong “System 2” reasoning abilities, answering a question in the field of artificial general intelligence whether LLMs can reason. The field started with the question whether LLMs can solve grade school math word problems. This paper reviews the rapidly expanding field of prompt-based reasoning with LLMs. Our taxonomy identifies different ways to generate, evaluate, and control multi-step reasoning. We provide an in-depth coverage of core approaches and open problems, and we propose a research agenda for the near future. Finally, we highlight the relation between reasoning and prompt-based learning, and we discuss the relation between reasoning, sequential decision processes, and reinforcement learning. We find that self-improvement, self-reflection, and some metacognitive abilities of the reasoning processes are possible through the judicious use of prompts. True self-improvement and self-reasoning, to go from reasoning with LLMs to reasoning by LLMs, remains future work.
摘要：将语言模型扩展到数十亿个参数，为情景学习提供了可能性，允许对模型未专门培训的任务进行教学调整和极少的学习。这在翻译、摘要和问答等语言任务上取得了突破性的表现。此外，除了这些联想的“系统一号”任务外，思维链式提示学习的最新进展显示出强大的“系统二号”推理能力，回答了人工通用智能领域的一个问题，即LLMS是否能够推理。该领域首先提出了LLMS能否解决小学数学应用题的问题。本文回顾了LLMS在基于提示推理领域的迅速发展。我们的分类确定了生成、评估和控制多步骤推理的不同方法。我们提供了对核心方法和开放问题的深入报道，并提出了近期的研究议程。最后，我们强调了推理和基于提示的学习之间的关系，并讨论了推理、序列决策过程和强化学习之间的关系。我们发现，通过明智地使用提示，推理过程中的自我完善、自我反思和一些元认知能力是可能的。真正的自我完善和自我推理，从用LLMS进行推理到用LLMS进行推理，仍然是未来的工作。

[NLP-30] MMSD-Net: Towards Multi-modal Stuttering Detection
[NLP-30] MMSD-Net：走向多模式口吃检测

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11492
作者: Liangyu Nie,Sudarsana Reddy Kadiri,Ruchit Agrawal
关键词: common speech impediment, million people, caused by irregular, irregular disruptions, Stuttering
中文关键词: 常见的言语障碍，百万人，由不规则、不规则的干扰引起，口吃
类目: ound (cs.SD); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Multimedia (cs.MM); Audio and Speech Processing (eess.AS)
备注: Accepted at INTERSPEECH 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Stuttering is a common speech impediment that is caused by irregular disruptions in speech production, affecting over 70 million people across the world. Standard automatic speech processing tools do not take speech ailments into account and are thereby not able to generate meaningful results when presented with stuttered speech as input. The automatic detection of stuttering is an integral step towards building efficient, context-aware speech processing systems. While previous approaches explore both statistical and neural approaches for stuttering detection, all of these methods are uni-modal in nature. This paper presents MMSD-Net, the first multi-modal neural framework for stuttering detection. Experiments and results demonstrate that incorporating the visual signal significantly aids stuttering detection, and our model yields an improvement of 2-17% in the F1-score over existing state-of-the-art uni-modal approaches.
摘要：口吃是一种常见的言语障碍，由言语产生的不定期中断引起，影响了全球超过7000万人。标准的自动语音处理工具不考虑语音疾病，因此在以口吃语音作为输入呈现时无法生成有意义的结果。口吃的自动检测是构建高效的、上下文感知的语音处理系统的重要一步。虽然以前的方法探索了统计和神经方法来检测口吃，但所有这些方法本质上都是单模式的。本文介绍了MMSD-Net，这是第一个用于口吃检测的多模式神经框架。实验和结果表明，结合视觉信号显着有助于口吃检测，并且我们的模型比现有最先进的单模式方法使F1评分提高了2-17%。

[NLP-31] Scientific QA System with Verifiable Answers
[NLP-31] 具有可验证答案的科学QA系统

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11485
作者: Adela Ljajić,Miloš Košprdić,Bojana Bašaragin,Darija Medvecki,Lorenzo Cassano,Nikola Milošević
关键词: pioneering open-source scientific, open-source scientific question-answering, Information Retrieval system, scientific question-answering system, Natural Language Inference
中文关键词: 开创性的开源科学、开源科学问答、信息检索系统、科学问答系统、自然语言推理
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Accepted at the 6th International Open Search Symposium 2024. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2402.18589

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In this paper, we introduce the VerifAI project, a pioneering open-source scientific question-answering system, designed to provide answers that are not only referenced but also automatically vetted and verifiable. The components of the system are (1) an Information Retrieval system combining semantic and lexical search techniques over scientific papers (PubMed), (2) a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) module using fine-tuned generative model (Mistral 7B) and retrieved articles to generate claims with references to the articles from which it was derived, and (3) a Verification engine, based on a fine-tuned DeBERTa and XLM-RoBERTa models on Natural Language Inference task using SciFACT dataset. The verification engine cross-checks the generated claim and the article from which the claim was derived, verifying whether there may have been any hallucinations in generating the claim. By leveraging the Information Retrieval and RAG modules, this http URL excels in generating factual information from a vast array of scientific sources. At the same time, the Verification engine rigorously double-checks this output, ensuring its accuracy and reliability. This dual-stage process plays a crucial role in acquiring and confirming factual information, significantly enhancing the information landscape. Our methodology could significantly enhance scientists’ productivity, concurrently fostering trust in applying generative language models within scientific domains, where hallucinations and misinformation are unacceptable.
摘要：在本文中，我们介绍了VerifAI项目，这是一个开创性的开源科学问答系统，旨在提供不仅可以参考，而且可以自动审查和验证的答案。该系统的组成部分是(1)结合语义和词汇搜索技术的科学论文信息检索系统(PubMed)，(2)使用微调生成模型(Mistral 7B)和检索到的文章来生成声明的检索-增强生成(RAG)模块，以及(3)基于微调的DeBERTa和XLM-Roberta模型的验证引擎，该验证引擎基于使用SciFACT数据集的自然语言推理任务。验证引擎交叉检查生成的索赔和从中派生索赔的文章，验证在生成索赔时是否存在任何幻觉。通过利用信息检索和RAG模块，此http URL在从大量科学来源生成事实信息方面表现出色。同时，验证引擎严格复核此输出，确保其准确性和可靠性。这一双重过程在获取和确认事实信息方面发挥着至关重要的作用，极大地增强了信息格局。我们的方法可以显著提高科学家的生产力，同时培养在科学领域应用生成性语言模型的信任，在科学领域，幻觉和错误信息是不可接受的。

[NLP-32] he Oscars of AI Theater: A Survey on Role-Playing with Language Models
[NLP-32] 人工智能剧院奥斯卡奖：语言模型角色扮演调查

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11484
作者: Nuo Chen,Y.Wang,Yang Deng,Jia Li
关键词: Large Language Models, advanced character-driven simulations, character-driven simulations facilitated, Large Language, early persona-based models
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、高级字符驱动模拟、促进字符驱动模拟、大型语言、早期基于人物角色的模型
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 28 pages

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This survey explores the burgeoning field of role-playing with language models, focusing on their development from early persona-based models to advanced character-driven simulations facilitated by Large Language Models (LLMs). Initially confined to simple persona consistency due to limited model capabilities, role-playing tasks have now expanded to embrace complex character portrayals involving character consistency, behavioral alignment, and overall attractiveness. We provide a comprehensive taxonomy of the critical components in designing these systems, including data, models and alignment, agent architecture and evaluation. This survey not only outlines the current methodologies and challenges, such as managing dynamic personal profiles and achieving high-level persona consistency but also suggests avenues for future research in improving the depth and realism of role-playing applications. The goal is to guide future research by offering a structured overview of current methodologies and identifying potential areas for improvement. Related resources and papers are available at this https URL.
摘要：这项调查探索了语言模型角色扮演的新兴领域，重点关注了它们从早期的基于人物角色的模型到由大型语言模型(LLM)推动的高级角色驱动模拟的发展。由于有限的模型能力，角色扮演任务最初仅限于简单的角色一致性，现在已经扩展到包括复杂的角色描述，包括角色一致性、行为一致性和整体吸引力。我们提供了设计这些系统的关键组件的全面分类，包括数据、模型和对齐、代理体系结构和评估。这项调查不仅概述了当前的方法和挑战，如管理动态个人资料和实现高级人物角色一致性，而且还为未来在提高角色扮演应用程序的深度和现实性方面的研究提供了途径。其目标是通过提供对当前方法的结构化概述并确定潜在的改进领域来指导未来的研究。相关资源和论文可在此HTTPS URL上找到。

[NLP-33] Beyond Correctness: Benchmarking Multi-dimensional Code Generation for Large Language Models
[NLP-33] 超越正确性：大型语言模型的多维代码生成基准

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11470
作者: Jiasheng Zheng,Boxi Cao,Zhengzhao Ma,Ruotong Pan,Hongyu Lin,Yaojie Lu,Xianpei Han,Le Sun
关键词: proposed numerous benchmarks, large language models, recent years, proposed numerous, large language
中文关键词: 提出了许多基准，大型语言模型，近年来，提出了许多大型语言
类目: oftware Engineering (cs.SE); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: We release benchmark at this https URL and leaderboard at this https URL

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In recent years, researchers have proposed numerous benchmarks to evaluate the impressive coding capabilities of large language models (LLMs). However, existing benchmarks primarily focus on assessing the correctness of code generated by LLMs, while neglecting other critical dimensions that also significantly impact code quality. Therefore, this paper proposes the RACE benchmark, which comprehensively evaluates the quality of code generated by LLMs across 4 dimensions: Readability, mAintainability, Correctness, and Efficiency. Specifically, considering the demand-dependent nature of dimensions beyond correctness, we design various types of user requirements for each dimension to assess the model’s ability to generate correct code that also meets user demands. We evaluate 18 representative LLMs on RACE and find that: 1) the current LLMs’ ability to generate high-quality code on demand does not yet meet the requirements of software development; 2) readability serves as a critical indicator of the overall quality of generated code; 3) most LLMs exhibit an inherent preference for specific coding style. These findings can help researchers gain a deeper understanding of the coding capabilities of current LLMs and shed light on future directions for model improvement.
摘要：近年来，研究人员提出了许多基准来评估大型语言模型(LLM)令人印象深刻的编码能力。然而，现有的基准测试主要集中于评估LLMS生成的代码的正确性，而忽略了也显著影响代码质量的其他关键维度。因此，本文提出了RACE基准测试，它从可读性、可维护性、正确性和效率四个维度对LLMS生成的代码质量进行综合评估。具体地说，考虑到维度超越正确性的需求依赖性质，我们为每个维度设计了各种类型的用户需求，以评估模型生成也满足用户需求的正确代码的能力。我们在RACE上对18个有代表性的LLM进行了评估，发现：1)现有LLM的按需生成高质量代码的能力还不能满足软件开发的要求；2)可读性是生成代码整体质量的关键指标；3)大多数LLM表现出对特定编码风格的内在偏好。这些发现可以帮助研究人员更深入地了解当前LLM的编码能力，并为模型改进的未来方向提供指导。

[NLP-34] rust No Bot: Discovering Personal Disclosures in Human-LLM Conversations in the Wild
[NLP-34] 铁锈无机器人：在人类-法学硕士野外对话中发现个人揭露

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11438
作者: Niloofar Mireshghallah,Maria Antoniak,Yash More,Yejin Choi,Golnoosh Farnadi
关键词: Measuring personal disclosures, large language models, personal disclosures made, facilitate privacy research, Measuring personal
中文关键词: 衡量个人披露、大型语言模型、个人披露、促进隐私研究、衡量个人
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Measuring personal disclosures made in human-chatbot interactions can provide a better understanding of users’ AI literacy and facilitate privacy research for large language models (LLMs). We run an extensive, fine-grained analysis on the personal disclosures made by real users to commercial GPT models, investigating the leakage of personally identifiable and sensitive information. To understand the contexts in which users disclose to chatbots, we develop a taxonomy of tasks and sensitive topics, based on qualitative and quantitative analysis of naturally occurring conversations. We discuss these potential privacy harms and observe that: (1) personally identifiable information (PII) appears in unexpected contexts such as in translation or code editing (48% and 16% of the time, respectively) and (2) PII detection alone is insufficient to capture the sensitive topics that are common in human-chatbot interactions, such as detailed sexual preferences or specific drug use habits. We believe that these high disclosure rates are of significant importance for researchers and data curators, and we call for the design of appropriate nudging mechanisms to help users moderate their interactions.
摘要：在人与聊天机器人的交互中测量个人信息披露可以更好地了解用户的人工智能素养，并有助于大型语言模型(LLM)的隐私研究。我们对真实用户向商业GPT模型披露的个人信息进行了广泛、细粒度的分析，调查了个人身份和敏感信息的泄露。为了理解用户向聊天机器人透露的上下文，我们基于对自然发生的对话的定性和定量分析，开发了任务和敏感主题的分类。我们讨论了这些潜在的隐私危害，并观察到：(1)个人身份信息(PII)出现在意想不到的环境中，如在翻译或代码编辑中(分别有48%和16%的时间)和(2)仅有PII检测不足以捕获人类与聊天机器人交互中常见的敏感话题，如详细的性偏好或特定的药物使用习惯。我们认为，这些高披露比率对研究人员和数据管理人员具有重要意义，我们呼吁设计适当的推送机制来帮助用户缓和他们的互动。

[NLP-35] States Hidden in Hidden States: LLMs Emerge Discrete State Representations Implicitly
[NLP-35] 隐藏在隐藏状态中的状态：LLM隐含地出现离散状态表示

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11421
作者: Junhao Chen,Shengding Hu,Zhiyuan Liu,Maosong Sun
关键词: Large Language Models, Large Language, Language Models, Large, Language
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，大型语言，语言模型，大型，语言
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit various emergent abilities. Among these abilities, some might reveal the internal working mechanisms of models. In this paper, we uncover a novel emergent capability in models: the intrinsic ability to perform extended sequences of calculations without relying on chain-of-thought step-by-step solutions. Remarkably, the most advanced models can directly output the results of two-digit number additions with lengths extending up to 15 addends. We hypothesize that the model emerges Implicit Discrete State Representations (IDSRs) within its hidden states and performs symbolic calculations internally. To test this hypothesis, we design a sequence of experiments that look into the hidden states. Specifically, we first confirm that IDSRs exist. Then, we provide interesting observations about the formation of IDSRs from layer, digit, and sequence perspectives. Finally, we confirm that models indeed use IDSRs to produce the final answers. However, we also discover that these state representations are far from lossless in current open-sourced models, leading to inaccuracies in their final performance. Our work presents a novel exploration of LLMs’ symbolic calculation abilities and the underlying mechanisms.
摘要：大型语言模型(LLM)表现出多种突现能力。在这些能力中，有一些可能揭示了模型的内在工作机制。在这篇文章中，我们揭示了模型中一种新的紧急能力：执行扩展计算序列的内在能力，而不依赖于思想链逐步解决方案。值得注意的是，最先进的型号可以直接输出两位数的加法结果，长度可达15个加数。我们假设模型在其隐藏状态中出现隐式离散状态表示(IDSR)，并在内部执行符号计算。为了验证这一假设，我们设计了一系列研究隐藏状态的实验。具体地说，我们首先确认IDSR的存在。然后，我们从层、数字和序列的角度对IDSR的形成进行了有趣的观察。最后，我们确认模型确实使用IDSR来产生最终答案。然而，我们也发现，在当前的开源模型中，这些状态表示远不是无损的，导致它们最终的性能不准确。我们的工作为LLMS的符号计算能力及其潜在机制提供了一种新的探索。

[NLP-36] LOTUS: Enabling Semantic Queries with LLMs Over Tables of Unstructured and Structured Data
[NLP-36] LOTUS：在非结构化和结构化数据表上使用LLM启用语义收件箱

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11418
作者: Liana Patel,Siddharth Jha,Carlos Guestrin,Matei Zaharia
关键词: vast knowledge corpora, enable rich analytics, knowledge corpora, potential to enable, analytics and reasoning
中文关键词: 庞大的知识库、实现丰富的分析、知识库、实现潜力、分析和推理
类目: Databases (cs.DB); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The semantic capabilities of language models (LMs) have the potential to enable rich analytics and reasoning over vast knowledge corpora. Unfortunately, existing systems lack high-level abstractions to perform semantic queries at scale. We introduce semantic operators, a declarative programming interface that extends the relational model with composable AI-based operations for semantic queries over datasets (e.g., sorting or aggregating records using natural language criteria). Each operator can be implemented and optimized in multiple ways, opening a rich space for execution plans similar to relational operators. We implement our operators and several optimizations for them in LOTUS, an open-source query engine with a Pandas-like API. We demonstrate LOTUS’ effectiveness across a series of real applications, including fact-checking, extreme multi-label classification, and search. We find that LOTUS’ programming model is highly expressive, capturing state-of-the-art query pipelines with low development overhead. Specifically, on the FEVER dataset, LOTUS’ programs can reproduce FacTool, a recent state-of-the-art fact-checking pipeline, in few lines of code, and implement a new pipeline that improves accuracy by 9.5% , while offering 7-34\times lower execution time. In the extreme multi-label classification task on the BioDEX dataset, LOTUS reproduces state-of-the art result quality with its join operator, while providing an efficient algorithm that runs 800\times faster than a naive join. In the search and ranking application, LOTUS allows a simple composition of operators to achieve 5.9 - 49.4% higher nDCG@10 than the vanilla retriever and re-ranker, while also providing query efficiency, with 1.67 - 10\times lower execution time than LM-based ranking methods used by prior works. LOTUS is publicly available at this https URL. Subjects: Databases (cs.DB); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL) Cite as: arXiv:2407.11418 [cs.DB] (or arXiv:2407.11418v1 [cs.DB] for this version)
摘要：语言模型(LMS)的语义能力有可能对大量的知识语料库进行丰富的分析和推理。遗憾的是，现有系统缺乏高级抽象来大规模执行语义查询。我们引入了语义运算符，这是一种声明性编程接口，它使用基于人工智能的可组合操作来扩展关系模型，以进行数据集上的语义查询(例如，使用自然语言标准对记录进行排序或聚合)。每个运算符可以通过多种方式实现和优化，从而为类似于关系运算符的执行计划打开了丰富的空间。我们在Lotus中实现了我们的运算符和一些针对它们的优化，这是一个具有类似Pandas的API的开源查询引擎。我们通过一系列实际应用程序演示了Lotus的有效性，包括事实核查、极端多标签分类和搜索。我们发现，Lotus的编程模型具有很强的表现力，能够以较低的开发开销捕获最先进的查询管道。具体地说，在FEVER数据集上，莲花的程序可以在几行代码中复制最近最先进的事实检查流水线FacTool，并实现一个新的流水线，将精度提高9.5%，同时将执行时间减少7-34倍。在Biodex数据集的极端多标签分类任务中，莲花使用其连接操作符再现了最先进的结果质量，同时提供了一种运行速度比朴素连接快800\倍的高效算法。在搜索和排序应用中，Lotus允许简单的操作组合达到比普通检索器和重排序器高5.9-49.4\10的nDCG@10，同时还提供了查询效率，执行时间比以前工作中使用的基于LM的排序方法低1.67-10倍。莲花在这个HTTPS URL上公开可用。主题：数据库(cs.DB)；人工智能(cs.AI)；计算与语言(cs.CL)引用AS：arxiv：2407.11418cs.DB

[NLP-37] SPINACH: SPARQL-Based Information Navigation for Challenging Real-World Questions
[NLP-37] SPINACH：基于SPARQL的信息导航，用于解答现实世界的问题

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11417
作者: Shicheng Liu,Sina J. Semnani,Harold Triedman,Jialiang Xu,Isaac Dan Zhao,Monica S. Lam
关键词: Recent work integrating, Base Question Answering, Knowledge Base Question, Recent work, work integrating Large
中文关键词: 最近的工作整合，基础问题解答，知识库问题，最近的工作，工作整合大型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Recent work integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) has led to significant improvements in the Knowledge Base Question Answering (KBQA) task. However, we posit that existing KBQA datasets that either have simple questions, use synthetically generated logical forms, or are based on small knowledge base (KB) schemas, do not capture the true complexity of KBQA tasks. To address this, we introduce the SPINACH dataset, an expert-annotated KBQA dataset collected from forum discussions on Wikidata’s “Request a Query” forum with 320 decontextualized question-SPARQL pairs. Much more complex than existing datasets, SPINACH calls for strong KBQA systems that do not rely on training data to learn the KB schema, but can dynamically explore large and often incomplete schemas and reason about them. Along with the dataset, we introduce the SPINACH agent, a new KBQA approach that mimics how a human expert would write SPARQLs for such challenging questions. Experiments on existing datasets show SPINACH’s capability in KBQA, achieving a new state of the art on the QALD-7, QALD-9 Plus and QALD-10 datasets by 30.1%, 27.0%, and 10.0% in F1, respectively, and coming within 1.6% of the fine-tuned LLaMA SOTA model on WikiWebQuestions. On our new SPINACH dataset, SPINACH agent outperforms all baselines, including the best GPT-4-based KBQA agent, by 38.1% in F1. Subjects: Computation and Language (cs.CL) Cite as: arXiv:2407.11417 [cs.CL] (or arXiv:2407.11417v1 [cs.CL] for this version)
